meta.name: Cash Flow Planner
meta.purpose: Drag-and-drop scheduling of payables, receivables, and bank-facility draws/repayments onto a multi-year calendar, with a live running cash balance, lowest-cash detection, and facility-limit guards.
meta.audience: Finance controller / CFO-office operator. Numerate, fast, impatient.
meta.scope: UI/UX polish only. No feature or logic changes.

techConstraints.framework: vanilla JS + jQuery, no SPA framework
techConstraints.styling: single injected <style id='cfp-demo-styles'> block; embedded Credit Terms table uses its own injected styles keyed to 'sct-*'
techConstraints.theming: MUST use Frappe theme CSS variables (var(--green-600), var(--bg-blue), var(--control-bg), ...). Light AND dark mode must both work. Hex fallbacks alongside vars are allowed.
techConstraints.domStability: Prefer restyling existing classes or adding modifier classes. Avoid renaming/removing classes; styles are keyed to them.

layout.model: 4 stacked zones; the middle zone is a 3-column grid

contains: toolbar (undo/redo, opening balance, horizon select, Merge/Save/Plans/Export/Reset)

zones.role: Zone B — the calendar board (dominant surface)
levels: macro = months of one year (paged by ◀ year ▶)

zones.role: Zone D — per-invoice Credit Terms table (reference detail; overview widgets intentionally suppressed)

colorSemantics.note: Load-bearing meanings — recolor for polish but keep what each hue MEANS.
colorSemantics.green: inflow / receivable / positive cash / within facility limit
colorSemantics.red: outflow / payable / negative cash / overdue / hard-limit breach
colorSemantics.blue: selection / horizon focus band / drill affordance / 'early' timing / placed-card hover

designTokensCurrent.note: What the build uses today, as a starting point to refine.
designTokensCurrent.border: 1px solid var(--border-color) almost everywhere; 3px colored left-border on cards and reservoir folders; 3px colored top-border on reservoirs

components.name: Monitor / status strip
components.improve: Should read as a calm header, not compete with the board. Make the 3 KPIs and the negative-cash warning the most salient elements.

components.name: Facility bar
components.purpose: CC / BD usage vs soft & absolute limits
components.improve: Make soft-marker and the ok/soft/hard escalation clearer; flashing red may be too aggressive — propose a calmer but unmistakable danger treatment.

components.name: Reservoir (inbox)
components.purpose: Lists unscheduled blocks as collapsible per-counterparty folders; left=payables/financing, right=receivables
components.improve: Reduce competition between folder head, count, total, and cards. Quieter chrome, stronger card scannability. Works in ~236px.

components.name: Calendar column
components.purpose: One month/week/day; shows net, ▲in/▼out, running Σ, block count, Drill, and a droppable body
components.improve: Differentiate the 3 drill levels visually; make horizon-vs-future obvious without reading; clarify the running-balance pill.

components.name: Year toggle
components.purpose: Page the macro calendar between years (current → ~2035)
components.improve: Make it feel like a confident primary calendar control; show year-net clearly; disabled bounds states.

components.name: Block / card
components.purpose: One unit of money (invoice / facility line). Type tag, entity, flags, id, due date, timing pill, editable ₹ value (Lakhs), move/merge controls
components.improve: Most cramped element. Establish clear card rhythm; make editable-value vs read-only-value obviously different; signpost drag handle and ⋮/↩ controls; calm the tag/flag/badge clutter.

components.name: Embedded Credit Terms table
components.purpose: Per-invoice reference detail (sortable table, mode toggle, approval/note editor). Overview KPI tickers + net-position compare strip are intentionally OFF here.
components.improve: Should read as quiet reference under the board; header + 'Open full tool ↗' link to the standalone v2 demo. Keep table legible but subordinate.

interactions.drag: SortableJS; drag a card from a reservoir or column body onto a calendar column (or month → auto-settles to the week of its due date). Same-list drops snap back.
interactions.drillDown: Click a column's Drill ▸ : year→month→week→day. Breadcrumb + back button climb one level.
interactions.valueEdit: Type a new ₹ (Lakhs) value; reducing it splits the card into a kept piece + a residual fragment (fragment has ↩ to merge back).
interactions.moveMenu: ⋮ opens a menu of placement targets (reservoir + horizon weeks, or days within a week).
interactions.filters: Per-side search + pills (★ Priority, ▲ High Value, ⏱ Overdue); non-matching placed cards dim live.
interactions.locate: Clicking a placed card jumps to where it lives and flashes it.
interactions.guards: Facility hard-limit blocks an over-limit drop; soft-limit warns; past-date drop asks for confirmation; weekend/holiday drop warns.

painPoints: Uniform weight/size/border → no clear focal point; primary signals don't pop.
Weak hierarchy across the 4 zones; the board should dominate.
The 3 calendar drill levels look nearly identical; users lose their place.
Horizon focus band vs dimmed future columns is too subtle.
Reservoirs are busy in a narrow column.
Cards are cramped; editable vs read-only value not distinct.
Many encoded states (placed/dimmed/overdue/late/early/past/weekend/holiday) are easy to miss.

improvementGoals.goal: Visual hierarchy: board first, monitor as calm status strip, reservoirs as quiet inboxes, table as reference.
Make the money story pop: running balance, lowest-cash point, negative warning, and limit breaches most salient.
Differentiate macro/month/micro levels and horizon-vs-future at a glance.
Calmer, more scannable cards and reservoir folders; obvious editable vs locked and placed vs unplaced.
Stronger, friendlier drag affordances and empty/drop states.
Dense-but-breathable rhythm; graceful narrow-width and full dark-mode parity.

deliverables: Refined visual system (type scale, spacing rhythm, weight contrast, border/elevation, theme-var palette, focus/hover) as CSS mapping onto existing cfp-* / sct-* classes.
Zone-by-zone redesign notes with before/after: monitor/KPI strip, calendar columns (3 levels), reservoir folders, block card.
Full component-state spec (card, column, facility bar, empty/drop, buttons/pills).
Annotated mockups for macro / month / micro views + a single card + a reservoir folder.
Responsive/narrow-width notes and dark-mode parity notes.
